_comment: Quick Desk chip defaults (Plan 0445). Served statically like pockit-catalog.json. Operator-added chips layer on top via localStorage 'pockit.quickDesk.userChips.v1'.

sections.title: Forge a repo
sections.hint: Paste a GitHub repo above, then tap a target

sections.title: My prompts
sections.hint: One tap fires a saved prompt at the AI

sections.title: Doors & runs
sections.hint: Open a door or copy a command

chips.label: Make Console
chips.hint: Forge the repo into a top-level Console (own door + Pockit tile)

chips.label: Make Cartridge
chips.hint: Forge the repo into a cartridge under Pockit

chips.label: Make Accessory
chips.hint: Forge the repo + install its Desktop .app accessory

chips.label: make doors
chips.hint: Copies the command — run it in your terminal (sudo)
